headline: Software Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States

experience.description: I am a CS student at NYU Courant. Interested in ML, NLP, Compilers and Graphics.

1. Branches: Built a framework to visualize advanced reasoning and planning algorithms like Tree Search with LLMs. Worked on Tree-of-Thought + Reflexion style planning algorithms for objective problem solving.
2. Verilog Code Gen: Explored LLMs for Verilog Code Generation, using prompting, contrained generation, execution feedback and reinforcement learning to solve the VerilogEval dataset.… more

I primarily worked on ML Automation of Taxonomy Tagging at Scale. I wore many hats like Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer.
1. Developed and Deployed over 250+ image models for various attributes like sleeve_length, pattern, etc for over 35 product categories
2. Color quantization models using Vision Transformers and K-Means Clustering
3. A baseline brute force continual learning framework for periodic retraining of models.
4. Model tracking and experimentation using neptune.ai
5. Deployment of batch-mode inference using Pyspark + EMR + Airflow
6. Python project development using nbdev.fast.ai

Apart from technical work, I proactively:
1. Hosted a weekly research & talks forum
2. Mentored juniors and interns
3. Wrote blog posts
4. Gave work demos and presented in org-wide forums… more

A Research Intern with the "Vision for Mobility" Group under CVIT in IIIT-H. Did some research on:
1. Occluded Object Detection of Traffic Signs.
2. Missing object detection… more
